creator: hohmuth@inf.tu-dresden.de
text:
When encountering dates specified like "18 Jan 00 22:11:35", leafnode+
assumes the date refers to year 1900, not 2000.  This can lead to
news articles being missed out.

How-To-Repeat: 
root(hohmuth)@olymp:~# /usr/local/sbin/fetchnews 
107880 is posted more than 1003 days ago: 16 Jan 00 20:30
108525 is posted more than 1003 days ago: 18 Jan 00 22:11:35 
108526 is posted more than 1003 days ago: 18 Jan 00 22:13:09 
108527 is posted more than 1003 days ago: 18 Jan 00 22:15:44
